name: WLF_LMC_CONTENT_OBJECTS_VL
query: select R.CONTENT_ID, C.name, C.description, R.TRACKING_TYPE, R.EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER, R.LANGUAGE_ID, R.AUTHOR, R.CATALOG, R.CATALOG_NUMBER, R.KEYWORDS, R.VERSION, R.PRICE, R.MONETARY_UNIT, R.IS_COPYRIGHTED, R.COPYRIGHT_TEXT, R.IS_CONTROLLED, R.CONTENT_SERVER_ID, R.INITIAL_FILE, R.CONTENT_DIRECTORY, R.STARTING_URL, R.MASTERY_SCORE, R.TEST_ID, R.LAUNCH_DATA, R.DURATION, R.LAST_UPDATE_METHOD, R.EXTERNAL_SRC, R.EXTRA_INFO, R.IS_NOTIFICATION, R.LAUNCH_OUTSIDE_PLAYER, R.IS_VISIBLE, R.USE_PLAYER_PREFERENCES, R.SHOW_TOOLBAR, R.TOOLBAR_BUTTONS, R.NEW_PLAYER_WINDOW, R.WINDOW_WIDTH, R.WINDOW_HEIGHT, R.TIME_LIMIT_ACTION, R.CREATED_BY, R.CREATION_DATE, R.LAST_UPDATED_BY, R.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, R.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, R.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, R.ENTERPRISE_ID, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE1, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE2, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE3, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE4, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE5, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE6, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE7, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE8, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE9, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE10, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE11, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE12, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE13, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE14, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE15, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE16, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE17, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE18, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE19, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE20, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE21, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE22, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE23, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE24, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE25, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE26, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE27, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE28, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE29, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE30, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, R.CLD_ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 from wlf_cm_contents_vl C, wlf_lmc_content_details R where C.content_id = R.content_id and C.status = 'ACTIVE'
